explanation: Black Friday spike — 3x normal daily volume. Expected seasonal pattern consistent with retail calendar.
Holiday season pre-Christmas rush. Consistent with Q4 seasonal patterns in previous year.
Single Enterprise customer (Acme Corp) with total spend 10x the average. Multiple large server and integration purchases. Likely a key account.
39% revenue drop in February compared to January. Likely post-holiday slowdown combined with shortest month. Compare to Feb 2024 for year-over-year context.
Electronics category return rate (18.5%) is nearly double the company average (10%). The Budget Laptop alone accounts for 20% returns. Possible quality issue with supplier.
Two sales reps in the Plains and Upper Midwest territories are below 65% quota attainment while company average is 98%. Territories may need quota adjustment or additional support.
Average discount rate has increased from 8% in Q1 to 14.2% in Q3. This margin erosion trend warrants review of discounting policies.
